description: Integration-aware UI, AI brain context, offline queues, and Spotify personalization without OAuth. Tasks/Calendar/Slides/Gmail disconnected states show appropriate banners and disabled buttons. Backend user_context.py includes connected/disconnected service info. Offline queues for tasks and calendar. Spotify settings show playlist URL always (no OAuth).
steps: 1. Update Tasks page banner text to 'Google Tasks is not connected. Your changes are saved locally.' and keep full editability.
2. Update Calendar page banner text to 'Google Calendar is not connected. Connect in Settings to sync your events.' and keep full local editability.
3. Update Tasks page: Slides 'Create Presentation' button disabled with tooltip when Slides disconnected. Gmail 'Scan Inbox' button disabled with tooltip when Gmail disconnected.
4. Update backend get_user_context() to include connected/disconnected services info.
5. Add offline queue for Tasks (chronai-task-queue localStorage key) and Calendar (chronai-calendar-queue).
6. Add pending sync indicator showing 'X changes pending sync'.
7. Update Spotify settings: always show playlist URL input, remove OAuth connect/disconnect, add suggested playlists.
8. Update SpotifyMiniPlayer to check playlist URL existence instead of connected flag.
acceptance_criteria: Tasks page shows correct banner text when disconnected
Calendar page shows correct banner text when disconnected
Create Presentation button disabled when Slides disconnected
Scan Inbox button disabled when Gmail disconnected
Backend user_context includes service connection status
Offline queue stores task/calendar operations in localStorage
Pending sync indicator visible when queue has items
Spotify settings always shows playlist URL input with suggested playlists
SpotifyMiniPlayer renders based on playlist URL existence
python -m py_compile passes for modified backend files
